_meta.name: ALM 14B r8c FP8 launch (dedicated pod, torch 2.9 + TE)
_meta.authorization: user go — 2 H100 max — coordinate with r8a (#28)

coordination_with_r8a.task_28_pod_preference: ubzp169igb7tns (fast pod, r7's) — but that pod was TERMINATED after r7 completion

initial_pod_check.xhq9b2c8fljdyo_state: RUNNING, GPU idle 0 MiB / 0% util, no python or tmux sessions

coordination_with_r8a.r8c_decision: Leave xhq9b2c8fljdyo free for r8a (since that's the only available pre-existing pod). Provision a separate DEDICATED pod for r8c FP8 track. Torch downgrade to 2.9 breaks Unsloth — pod is FP8-only, not rotated to r8a/b/c.
coordination_with_r8a.pod_count_check: 1 (xhq9b2c8fljdyo for r8a) + 1 (new dn6eixsgzrjlnz for r8c) = 2 H100 = WITHIN budget
coordination_with_r8a.r8a_coordination: r8c avoids touching xhq9b2c8fljdyo. R27 no-step-on-other-sessions.

pod.name: anima-p4-alm-r8c-fp8
pod.dedicated_to: FP8 only — torch 2.9 pin, no Unsloth, no r8a/b rotation

plan.step_1_torch_downgrade: pip install --force-reinstall torch==2.9.0 --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu121 (or cu124 if H100 SM_90 unstable on cu121)
plan.step_2_unsloth_uninstall: pip uninstall -y unsloth unsloth-zoo (if present; FP8 path does not use Unsloth)
plan.step_8_measurement_50_steps: If smoke PASS, continue 50 steps for measurement

r7_baseline_for_comparison.note: Fair comparison against same b/g/s config, but DIFFERENT pod due to fleet variance (31% observed r7 vs r6 pod same stack)

fallback_chain_if_te_install_fails: torch==2.10 + TE from source w/ cudnn-dev install

success_criteria.smoke_verdict_pass_if: 20 steps complete without crash, loss finite, loss decreasing
success_criteria.celebration_condition: FP8 measurement >= 75% bf16-MFU OR >= 40% fp8-MFU = bf16 ceiling BREAKTHROUGH
success_criteria.accuracy_check: loss curve monotonic decrease, no NaN/Inf, CE within 0.05 of bf16 at same step
